question: In Unity, which MonoBehaviour message runs first: Awake or Start? Answer one word.
Which MonoBehaviour callback runs on the fixed timestep and is where Rigidbody forces should be applied? Method name only.
Which MonoBehaviour method starts a coroutine? Method name only.
Inside a coroutine, which class do you 'yield return new' to wait a number of seconds in scaled time? Class name only.
What does GetComponent<T>() return when the component is not present? One word.
Which preprocessor define wraps code that must compile only in the Unity Editor? Symbol only.
Which 3D callback fires when a collider first enters a trigger volume? Method name only.
Which attribute exposes a private field in the Inspector? Attribute name only, no brackets.
In a default Unity project, what is Time.fixedDeltaTime in seconds? Number only.
Which Time property gives frame delta time unaffected by Time.timeScale? Property name only.
Which yield instruction class waits until the end of the current frame, after rendering? Class name only.
Which attribute adds a ScriptableObject to the Assets > Create menu? Attribute name only, no brackets.
Which attribute shows a numeric field as a slider with min/max in the Inspector? Attribute name only, no brackets.
Inside a coroutine, 'yield return ___;' waits exactly one frame. Fill the blank with one keyword.
Which MonoBehaviour method tries to get a component and returns a bool, avoiding a null check? Method name only.
In Unity 6, Rigidbody.velocity was renamed (the old name is deprecated). What is the new property name? Property name only.
In Unity 6, Object.FindObjectOfType is deprecated. Name ONE replacement method. Method name only.
Which class introduced in Unity 6 enables async/await for frame/time waiting without external libraries? Class name only.
What is the namespace of Unity's current (new) Input System package? Namespace only.
Which MonoBehaviour method compares a GameObject's tag without allocating, preferred over '== gameObject.tag'? Method name only.
Which per-frame callback should NOT contain heavy work like GameObject.Find? Method name only.
For best practice, in which callback should you cache a GetComponent result once? Method name only.
To compare distances without a square-root and without GC, compare Vector3.___ instead of Vector3.Distance. Property name only.
A running coroutine stops automatically when its GameObject becomes what? One word.
Modifying a List<T> while iterating it with foreach throws which exception? Exception type name only.
Which Unity type, assignable in the Inspector, is used instead of a C# event for designer-wired callbacks? Type name only.
Multiplying movement by which Time value in Update makes it frame-rate independent? Answer the Time member.
Will OnTriggerEnter fire if NEITHER of the two colliders has a Rigidbody? Answer yes or no.
Is Update() called on a MonoBehaviour whose component is disabled? Answer yes or no.
Which attribute prevents a PUBLIC field from being serialized by Unity? Attribute name only, no brackets or namespace.
